name: Sendinês (Mirandese meridional)
notes: Sendinês subdialect of Mirandese, spoken in Vila de Sendim (southern extreme of Terra de Miranda). Differs from central Mirandese in: (1) monophthongization of -iê- → -i- and -uô- → -u- (tirra not tiêrra, curpo not cuôrpo); (2) NO palatalization of initial L- (luna not lhuna, lobo not lhobu). Orthographic addendum (2000) reflects these differences. Written ⟨-ie-⟩ and ⟨-uo-⟩ instead of ⟨-iê-⟩ and ⟨-uô-⟩.
